review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with the control SC-7 (4) for boundary protection in Kubernetes. The naming conventions are mostly followed, and the functions map to relevant Kubernetes security controls. However, minor improvements in naming consistency and clarity could be made.
naming_improvements: Consider adding more specificity to 'k8s_service_type_loadbalancer_restricted' to indicate what restrictions are applied, e.g., 'k8s_service_type_loadbalancer_internal_only'.
title: Boundary Protection | External Telecommunications Services
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7 (4) focuses on boundary protection and ensuring that external telecommunications services are not publicly accessible without proper security measures. In Kubernetes, similar protections can be implemented using NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that pods are not exposed to the internet by default. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources helps prevent unauthorized public access.
